messages.title: ACADEMY ONLINE
messages.body: TRANSMISSION PROTOCOLS is live: nine modules on the NC Zoning Data API, ending in field certification.

messages.title: LIVE LABS HIT THE REAL API
messages.body: Lab exercises send real requests to api.nczoning.net, capped at 100 requests per 10 seconds per IP.

messages.title: NO ACCOUNT REQUIRED
messages.body: Your service record stays in this browser. Eject it to a shard file to carry your progress between terminals.
